steps: Go to https://huggingface.co and log in (or create a free account)
Click your profile picture in the top-right corner and select 'Settings'
In the left sidebar, click 'Access Tokens'
Enter a name for the token and select the role: 'Read' for inference only, or 'Write' for model uploads
Copy the token immediately — it is shown only once

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: User Access Token
credential_fields.description: Your Hugging Face User Access Token, used as a Bearer token for Inference API calls

notes: Free tier includes limited Inference API usage; higher rate limits require a Pro subscription ($9/month)
Use a 'Read' token for inference; only use 'Write' if you also need to upload models
Fine-grained tokens can restrict access to specific models or organizations
The Serverless Inference API (router.huggingface.co) uses the same token
Token is shown only once at creation — copy and store it securely

test_endpoint.description: Verify the access token by retrieving the authenticated user's profile
